act: Model Tenancy Act / State Rent Control Acts

sections.title: Security Deposit
sections.plain_language: The landlord can only take a maximum of 2 months' rent as security deposit for residential properties.
sections.what_it_says: Security deposit shall be refunded by the landlord to the tenant at the time of taking over possession of the premises.

sections.title: Eviction of tenant
sections.plain_language: A tenant cannot be evicted without a valid reason and proper notice.
sections.punishment: Wrongful eviction can be challenged in the Rent Court.
